ogTitle: Emu Downs vs Encounter Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Emu Downs and Encounter Bay.
heading: Emu Downs vs Encounter Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Emu Downs, South Australia and Encounter Bay, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Encounter Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Emu Downs (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Emu Downs or Encounter Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Emu Downs has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Encounter Bay scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Emu Downs scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Encounter Bay scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Emu Downs or Encounter Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Encounter Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
